request.description: Import a list of provisioned (managed) devices

query.description: The type of the offer acceptable values are SVOD, TVOD, Bundle, Free, PPV.
A boolean parameter to check if the offer is enabled or not
A boolean parameter to check the expiry date of the offer.
A boolean parameter to check the start date of the offer.
A boolean parameter to check the selling expiry date of the offer.
A boolean parameter to check the selling start date of the offer.
